# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

// Sanitize header name to prevent header injection attacks
function isValidHeaderName(name: string): boolean {
  // Only allow alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
  return /^[a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+$/.test(name);
}

// Sanitize header value to prevent CRLF injection
function isValidHeaderValue(value: string): boolean {
  // Reject values containing CR or LF characters
  return !/[\r\n]/.test(value);
}

// List of headers that should not be overridden by user input
const FORBIDDEN_HEADERS = new Set([
  'host',
  'connection',
  'transfer-encoding',
  'keep-alive',
  'upgrade',
  'proxy-authorization',
  'proxy-authenticate',
  'te',
  'trailer',
  'set-cookie',
  'cookie',
  'access-control-allow-origin',
  'access-control-allow-credentials',
  'access-control-allow-methods',
  'access-control-allow-headers',
  'access-control-expose-headers',
  'content-security-policy',
  'x-frame-options',
  'x-content-type-options',
  'strict-transport-security',
]);

// Maximum allowed content size (1MB)
const MAX_CONTENT_SIZE = 1 * 1024 * 1024;
// Maximum number of custom headers allowed
const MAX_CUSTOM_HEADERS = 20;
// Maximum header value length
const MAX_HEADER_VALUE_LENGTH = 4096;

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed. Use POST.' }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Allow': 'POST',
      },
    });
  }

  let body: {
    content?: unknown;
    headers?: Record<string, string>;
    chunkSize?: number;
    delayMs?: number;
  };

  try {
    const rawBody = await request.text();

    if (rawBody.length > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Request body too large.' }), {
        status: 413,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
    }

    body = JSON.parse(rawBody);
  } catch {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON body.' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  if (!body.content) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing "content" field in request body.' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  // Serialize content to string safely
  let contentString: string;
  if (typeof body.content === 'string') {
    contentString = body.content;
  } else {
    try {
      contentString = JSON.stringify(body.content);
    } catch {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content cannot be serialized.' }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
    }
  }

  if (contentString.length > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content too large.' }), {
      status: 413,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  // Validate and sanitize chunk size (between 1 byte and 64KB)
  const chunkSize = Math.min(Math.max(Number(body.chunkSize) || 1024, 1), 65536);

  // Validate and sanitize delay (between 0ms and 1000ms to prevent abuse)
  const delayMs = Math.min(Math.max(Number(body.delayMs) || 0, 0), 1000);

  // Build safe response headers
  const responseHeaders = new Headers({
    'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
    'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'none'",
  });

  // Process user-provided headers with strict validation
  if (body.headers && typeof body.headers === 'object') {
    const headerEntries = Object.entries(body.headers);

    if (headerEntries.length > MAX_CUSTOM_HEADERS) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: `Too many custom headers. Maximum is ${MAX_CUSTOM_HEADERS}.` }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    for (const [key, value] of headerEntries) {
      const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase();

      // Skip forbidden/security-sensitive headers
      if (FORBIDDEN_HEADERS.has(lowerKey)) {
        continue;
      }

      // Validate header name
      if (!isValidHeaderName(key)) {
        continue;
      }

      // Validate header value
      if (typeof value !== 'string') {
        continue;
      }

      if (value.length > MAX_HEADER_VALUE_LENGTH) {
        continue;
      }

      if (!isValidHeaderValue(value)) {
        continue;
      }

      // Allow overriding Content-Type if it's a safe value
      if (lowerKey === 'content-type') {
        // Only allow text-based content types to prevent serving executable content
        const safeContentTypes = [
          'text/plain',
          'text/html',
          'text/csv',
          'text/event-stream',
          'application/json',
          'application/xml',
          'text/xml',
        ];
        const baseContentType = value.split(';')[0].trim().toLowerCase();
        if (safeContentTypes.includes(baseContentType)) {
          responseHeaders.set('Content-Type', value);
        }
        continue;
      }

      responseHeaders.set(key, value);
    }
  }

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const contentBytes = encoder.encode(contentString);

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        let offset = 0;

        while (offset < contentBytes.length) {
          const end = Math.min(offset + chunkSize, contentBytes.length);
          const chunk = contentBytes.slice(offset, end);
          controller.enqueue(chunk);
          offset = end;

          if (delayMs > 0 && offset < contentBytes.length) {
            await new Promise<void>((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, delayMs));
          }
        }

        controller.close();
      } catch (error) {
        controller.error(error);
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
